name: SPACE2
description: Rapidly clusters antibodies by the similarity of structural models and accurately groups antibodies that bind the same epitope. Clustered based on Ca RMSDs of CDR loop residues.
capabilities: Rapidly clusters antibodies by the similarity of structural models and accurately groups antibodies that bind the same epitope
Clustered based on Ca RMSDs of CDR loop residues

sequences.description: FASTA file containing antibody sequences to cluster by structural similarity
